title: 皐月賞の後に・駆け込みの大舞台

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... This is... all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even if I didn't have any flashy moments that set
me apart, I was still able to push myself to my
limits!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. Successfully finishing the
Satsuki Sho has made my heart feel so full.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't sure if I'd be okay going in, though. Um...
Sorry for all the trouble I caused.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Things had been a little dicey before the race started, thanks to that unexpected plot twist that hit us...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: OHHH NOOO! Trainer, Trainer! I... I—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I forgot to submit my paperwork for entering the
Satsuki Sho! Since I wasn't going to run it at first, I
totally forgot about it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh well! That's no biggie, is it? What's a little bit
of paperwork anyway? Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It is a biggie! I can't run in the race if I don't submit my paperwork!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I caused you so much stress and grief because of
my carelessness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, we meet up with Sakura Bakushin
O so we can head home together, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Look over there, where all the
reporters are. I recognize that Uma they're
surrounding...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! What will Brusquement's plans be
next? Will you be going straight for the Derby
next? Or perhaps—

text_block_list.name: Astute Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Nothing is set in stone yet, but it's highly likely
that we'll be running in the Derby next. At least,
that is the plan for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A throng of reporters bustles around
Brusquement. Despite how well Kitasan Black ran
today, everyone's attention is on her rival.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm still not good enough for anyone to
notice me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Chin up! Don't let this eat at you! The Classic
Triple Crown's barely even started!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is no time to turn your eyes away from the
finish line! Keep your head up and keep heading
toward tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's pep talk pulls Kitasan Black
out from the dumps. For now, I just want her to
make it out of this tunnel without stopping.
